title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Quite something for someone who's party is so bereft of talent that Chris Philp and Richard Holden are two of the better known members of the shadow cabinet.
